honest_issues: No branch or commit was created, per hard rule.
Only the focused doc/best-stack consistency suite was run; full repository test suite was not run because the lane blast radius is docs/config/test expectations.

The underlying W7 truth remains scoped: VERIFIED=0 unchanged; ball is internal-val only; P2-2 NOT-WIRING-READY; court verdict unchanged; P2-4 NO-ATTEMPT; speed headline gate-unscored; security/licensing are pre-launch gates.
The venv lacks jsonschema, so report schema validation used json.tool plus a dependency-free strict structural checker instead of Draft202012Validator.
Pre-existing unrelated dirty/untracked work remains untouched: configs/ssh/a100_known_hosts, brand-exploration/, and CVAT export zips.
next: Run the parked speed gate when auth/reauth and GPU window are available; for ball, finish the next 1,750-corpus/ARM-B scoring revision before any held-out ledger promotion attempt.
